violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the back storage area next to 3-bay sink was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the prep unit and 1-door low boy. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2026

The floor tiles in the back storage area were observed to be cracked and missing and the wall behind the 3-bay sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
The drain for the 3-bay sink in the back storage area is leaking and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2026

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by various objects in the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Items were removed from hand sink during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the coffee making area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap was provided during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

The floor tiles in the back storage area were observed to be cracked and missing and the wall behind the 3-bay sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Person that holds the license for Food Safety Manager was not present at time of inspection. No other employee has a food safety certification. Establishment does hot hold food items. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2023

The flooring in the back room near Exit door was observed in poor repair. Flooring has a large raised crack exposing concrete. Floor needs to be repaired. The lower part of wall to the left of the 3 bay sink was observed to be missing. Wall needs to be repaired. Floors and walls shall be constructed of a material that is non-absorbent, smooth, durable and easily cleanable. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024
